debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
l1 l2 : List α
idx1 idx2 : ℕ
hidx1 : idx1 < l1.length
hidx2 : idx2 < l2.length
heq : l1[idx1] = l2[idx2]
hperm : l1.Perm l2
⊢ (l1.eraseIdx idx1).Perm (l2.eraseIdx idx2)

proof:
suffices aux : ∀ (l : List α) (i : Nat) (hi : i < l.length), l.Perm (l[i] :: l.eraseIdx i) by
        have h1 := aux l1 idx1 hidx1
        have h2 := aux l2 idx2 hidx2
        have h3 : (l1[idx1] :: l1.eraseIdx idx1).Perm (l2[idx2] :: l2.eraseIdx idx2) := 
          h1.symm.trans (hperm.trans h2)
        rw [heq] at h3
        exact h3.cons_inv
      intro l i hi
      induction l generalizing i with
      | nil => exact absurd hi (Nat.not_lt_zero _)
      | cons a l' ih =>
        match i with
        | 0 => simp
        | i' + 1 =>
          simp only [List.getElem_cons_succ, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ, List.length_cons] at hi ⊢
          have hi' : i' < l'.length := Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hi
          exact (List.Perm.cons a (ih i' hi')).trans (List.Perm.swap _ _ _)
successful_attempts:
suffices aux : ∀ (l : List α) (i : Nat) (hi : i < l.length), l.Perm (l[i] :: l.eraseIdx i) by
        have h1 := aux l1 idx1 hidx1
        have h2 := aux l2 idx2 hidx2
        have h3 : (l1[idx1] :: l1.eraseIdx idx1).Perm (l2[idx2] :: l2.eraseIdx idx2) := 
          h1.symm.trans (hperm.trans h2)
        rw [heq] at h3
        exact h3.cons_inv
      intro l i hi
      induction l generalizing i with
      | nil => exact absurd hi (Nat.not_lt_zero _)
      | cons a l' ih =>
        match i with
        | 0 => simp
        | i' + 1 =>
          simp only [List.getElem_cons_succ, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ, List.length_cons] at hi ⊢
          have hi' : i' < l'.length := Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hi
          exact (List.Perm.cons a (ih i' hi')).trans (List.Perm.swap _ _ _)
